sections.title: Buildings, Worms & Insects Vocabulary — Introduction and Formula
sections.hindiTitle: Buildings, Worms & Insects Vocabulary — परिचय और फॉर्मूला
sections.explanation: Buildings, Worms & Insects Vocabulary is an essential building block of English. Formula: Subject + verb + building/insect noun (+ location/adjective). Rules: Building nouns (building, hospital, temple, bridge, tower, factory, mall) usually take 'the' when specific | Insect/worm nouns (ant, mosquito, cockroach, spider, butterfly, bee, fly, termite, earthworm, caterpillar) are usually countable | Use plural + 's' for general statements about insects (Ants walk / Bees make honey) | Location phrases (in the kitchen, on the flower, over the river) follow the noun

examples.english: This is a big building.

examples.hindi: अस्पताल शहर के बीच में है।
examples.english: The hospital is in the middle of the city.
The temple is very old.

examples.hindi: पुल नदी के ऊपर बना है।
examples.english: The bridge is built over the river.
There is a lot of noise in the factory.

examples.hindi: मॉल में बहुत सारी दुकानें हैं।
examples.english: There are many shops in the mall.

sections.title: Buildings, Worms & Insects Vocabulary — Daily Life Usage
sections.hindiTitle: Buildings, Worms & Insects Vocabulary — रोज़मर्रा के उपयोग
sections.explanation: Everyday sentences using Buildings, Worms & Insects Vocabulary for daily conversation.

examples.english: The tower is very tall.
The school building is new.

examples.hindi: चींटियाँ जमीन पर चल रही हैं।
examples.english: Ants are walking on the ground.
Mosquitoes bite at night.
The cockroach is hiding in the kitchen.
The spider wove a web.

sections.title: Buildings, Worms & Insects Vocabulary — Office & Professional Usage
sections.hindiTitle: Buildings, Worms & Insects Vocabulary — ऑफिस और पेशेवर उपयोग
sections.explanation: Practice Buildings, Worms & Insects Vocabulary in professional and office contexts.

examples.english: The butterfly is sitting on the flower.
Bees make honey.
The fly sat on the food.
Termites eat wood.

sections.title: Buildings, Worms & Insects Vocabulary — Negative and Question Forms
sections.hindiTitle: Buildings, Worms & Insects Vocabulary — नकारात्मक और प्रश्न रूप
sections.explanation: How to make negative sentences and questions using Buildings, Worms & Insects Vocabulary. Common mistakes are highlighted here.

examples.hindi: केंचुआ मिट्टी को उपजाऊ बनाता है।
examples.english: The earthworm makes the soil fertile.
The caterpillar eats leaves.
This building is a government office.

examples.hindi: कीड़े बारिश के बाद निकलते हैं।
examples.english: Insects come out after the rain.
